_ruleNotes.ARGO005: source.path points into the remote ARGO_REPO, not the local build root — existence can't be checked at synth time
_ruleNotes.EVL001: Dynamic env var lookups required for repo/endpoints
_ruleNotes.COR004: Exports consumed by the serializer, not same-file refs
_ruleNotes.EVL004: Spread of the readonly regions tuple from the shared argo config is safe
